transcript.text:
[People crowding over]
[That seems a little too much]
[It's beef today]
[Planning on eating everything from here]
[This is what Korean beef is all about]
[It's legendary that I'm seeing this in person]
These are the type of reactions for today]
[Where are we eating at today?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at the city of Sangju today
That's Gyeongcheonseom Park located in Nakdong River
You can go through this bridge
Look at that big balloon duck
This is Sangju's popular tourist attraction
There's this thing called "water bus" here
I'm here to try it out

Let's go!
[Sangju's Premium] [Gyeongcheonseom surrounded by nature]
The scenery is amazing
Rapeseeds bloom during Spring, and Cosmos bloom during the Fall
I've been told it's a great place to take photos
It'd be great to have a picnic here right now
There are a lot of photo-zones here
Check that out
Hello
There's an explanation
The legend of the golden frog
Kkot Joong Gi
Dalsu
Jaeru
They're everywhere
Is that Geumbok?

I'm going to have to take a photo
[Photo with the cuties]
Nakdong River's Water Bus Tour
They show the island here with a boat
I'm on my way for that
[Let's enjoy Gyeongcheonseom]
Hello~!
I've been waiting for you
I'm a fan I love you
Thank you
How do I get on?
There's no ticket booth for it
How about the fare?
Of course
There are 4 stops here
1 stop at a station is 5,000 Won (~$4 USD)

All 4 stops around the island is 10,000 Won (~$8 USD)
[Onboard]
These are very comfortable
That's why this boat is called "house porter"
There's an outside area too
[Let's go!]
The full course takes about an hour
But let's not take too long because I need to go eat
[Let's enjoy it]
[Don't need to worry about being seasick]
[Very refreshing from inside out]
Goodbye~!
Let's go eat now
[What are we eating today?]
I'm here to eat! Sangju is known for their beef
So I'm here to devour it

It looks like they have a lot of beef
[Even received an award]
Go go
[Sangju Chookhyup Myeongsil Sanggam Hanwoo] [Gyeongbuk, Sangju]
[Let's scan the menu]
What's in the special assorted platter?
[Bottom sirloin, Chuck Flap, & Sirloin]
I eat a lot 2 orders of the special assorted platter, please
And... There's more!
5 servings of the special cuts,
What's roseu pyeonchae?
Seared beef Cooked outside, raw inside
Well then...
1 brisket soybean stew,
1 roseu pyeonchae,
2 rib meat, 1 skirt meat, 1 top blade, 2 sirloin,

2 more bottom sirloin and 2 chuck flap, please
Alright, let me put that in
[Is this really right...?]
[For 1 person...]
[Just how much is this...?]
It's 2.4kg
For a party of 20
There's no way
[Roseu Pyeonchae]
-She can do it -All of this?!
She does mukbang
[Don't worry, she got this]
This looks so good
Neck chain, top blade, outside skirt,
sirloin, hanging tender, chuck flap, bottom sirloin
Skirt meat over there

Ribs,
Sirloin
Thank you
I had lots of beef meat before,
I can just tell its quality by the looks
This is no joke
Let's make a wrap
Roll it up I've never had this before
It's delicious I love the scent
This is 2 times better than I thought
3 times?
[With assorted vegetables]
The meat flavors are strong
Very savory
This is going to be great
I can just tell

They know how to do it
Outside skirt first
[Right on the grill]
Neck chain (rope meat) looks amazing too
I can probably eat this raw
Should I try a little?
Can I not?
[Still proceeds to eat it raw...]
That's good
[It's beef party today!]
Wow, this is no joke, It's going to be tasty, this is crazy, really, wow, it's the best
[Mouthwatering visuals]
I'll try this half piece first
With a little bit of salt
[Yes, this is it!]
The juiciness...

It's amazing Really good
Sangju Korean beef is so tasty
I saw a lot of farms on the way here
Sangju is widely known for their dried persimmon
I had no idea they had good beef too
[The sound makes it more painful to watch]
With some pickled leek
I want to savor every bite
[Neck chain next]
This part of the meat has little to no grease
Look how lean it is There's no grease
For these types of meat,
Cooked rare
It's done
It will not be as good if it's cooked well-done
[Really good...]

Rib eye
Looks really good The cap is really thick
That's enough
My instincts say so
Let's try the ribeye cap
The greasy parts don't have a consistency of an outside skirt
It's like the outside skirt, but juicy
Now for the ribeye
These are so good
[Brisket soybean stew]
[It's really a meat stew]
Boiling hot
Wow the brisket
Looks high-quality
All the soybean stew have been great lately
[A bite of the meat]

[With some soup]
Now for some chuck flap tail
That's so juicy
Dripping
I have to eat this right away
It's not dry at all
The outside is cooked well
And the rest melts on my tongue
Let's cook some steak now
This has to be good
The colors, wow
Cook for a while on low heat since it's very thick
[Cooked just right]
A bit of salt
It has to be good looking like that
How about some bottom sirloin now?

I love these
[Very similar to the chuck flap]
Let's eat this while we wait
Cut it in half
Look inside
It's ready
Chuck flaps give lots of flavor,
These are like that too but with more texture
The ribs are going to be good too These have the best smell
At least I think so Out of all the meat
The scent is really nice
It already looks good
Just from looking at it
[Busy cooking and eating]
That cutting sound
I like my meat cooked rare

These are called Sanggam Hanwoo
'Sang' because it's in Sangju
The persimmon skin has lots of nutrients and vitamins
And these are fed to the cows
They were raised with persimmon
Those awards we saw earlier,
It was given by the Seoul Summit
They're really good
[Bottom sirloin]
Let's try 1 cooked medium-rare
These are tasty
Next
[What next?]
-Hanging tender -Okay then
Since I haven't had it yet
Hanging tender and neck chain are really good

There's still 1 I haven't tried
Skirt meat
Flip only twice
[Some rice cake while she waits]
These are good too
I can feel the grains
[Let's speed it up]
What's sagol naengmyeon?
Should I eat one?
Cold noodles are a must when eating beef So I'll take 1
1 order of naengmyeon, please
We'll give it to you as dessert
Isn't that too small?
You ate a lot
Just eat the dessert one
As a meal, please

She can eat everything 100%
I looked her up and she ate 100 pieces of sushi
I don't know her too well
She's not just a big eater She's a very big eater
I can hear the sound of naengmyeon
A little loud
It's coming in 10 seconds
It's here!
Thank you
I've never seen this before What if it doesn't suit my taste?
Let's cook a little more
As a finale
I'm dying to try the broth
Delicious
I can taste the bone broth
With kimchi soup

It might not sound good, but it's delicious
It's good
[Finishing up the meat]
It's been a while since I've been to the southern area
I actually haven't been to the tourist attraction
It was very pretty Perfect for a picnic
And I didn't know they had good beef here
I saw the meat being served
You finished 2.4kg of meat?
This is the last bite
How can she fit all that food in her tiny body?
I'm not finished yet
[What do you mean...?]
There's still more
TIme for some dessert
Sangju is famous for their persimmon

Dried persimmon, ripe persimmon,
Dried ones here,
Jelly,
Year of the Tiger
So tiger-shaped pastry Cute, right?
Persimmon smoothie
100% ripe persimmon
Let's try this first
This is the real fruit
So sweet and tasty
Cute
Red bean paste
[Sweet red bean paste]
That's so good
[And she just had a meal...]
Mulberry juice

Look how thick it is
I love the smell
Dried persimmon
Saved it for last I love these
The ratio is perfect
There are a lot more tourist attractions here in Sangju
And it was my first time at Nakdong River
It's a perfect place for a picnic
The scenery was beautiful
Riding the boat was very refreshing too
And I got to find out how good their beef is
It'd be great to bring your family or friends for a trip
This is just too good
[A place filled with good times]
[Come to Sangju, a picturesque city where people and nature coexist] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
